title: trigger formatToDbms
text: trigger formatToDbms System trigger for encrypting data in a field when writing to the database. Use when implementing secure systems. Declaration: trigger formatToDbms Applies to: Field Activation: Activated when data for the field is written to the database. Default behavior: None Behavior upon completion: None Description The formatToDbms and formatFromDbms triggers enable you to implement secure systems. These triggers must provide round trip (inverse) results; that is, the source data in the database at the start of the process should be the same as the result after decryption and encryption. You can also use this trigger to convert an unsupported DBMS data type into one that Uniface can handle. Encryption can be done in either ProcScript or 3GL. In ProcScript, you can use $encode to encrypt data and $decode to decrypt data. For 3GL-based encryption, you can write a 3GL service for decryption and encryption and use the activate statement to activate it. Trigger Activation When writing data to the database, the write statement in the write (or writeUp) trigger for the entity activates the formatToDbms trigger for each field in the entity for which the formatToDbms trigger contains ProcScript. If the formatFromDbms trigger for the field contains ProcScript, it is also activated by the write statement immediately after firing the formatToDbms trigger, to synchronize internal data representation. Related Links $encode Encrypt data, sign messages with digital signatures, or convert data from one encoding scheme to another. trigger formatFromDbms System trigger for decrypting data for a field when reading from the database. Use when implementing secure systems. trigger write System trigger that handles processing when a new or modified occurrence is written to the database. trigger writeUp System trigger that handles processing when a new or modified occurrence of an Up entity must be written to the database. Call-Out From formatToDbms and formatFromDbms Triggers You can encrypt and decrypt data that is stored and retrieved from the database using the formatToDbms and formatFromDbms triggers of a field.
